title: Friendship & Love Emojis: Copy & Paste 🫂 Bestie Combos
meta_description: Friendship emojis to copy and paste: 🫂 hugs, 👯 besties, yellow hearts, and bestie combo sets for bios, captions, and DMs. Click any emoji to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Hugs, besties, and friendship hearts for the people you love — click any emoji to copy it instantly.
intro: Friendship emojis say what a plain text never quite can — from a quick 🫂 hug in a DM to a 👯 bestie post on a friendship anniversary. This library gathers hugging and holding-hands emojis, the yellow and white hearts traditionally used between friends, and the affectionate faces and small tokens that round out a caption. Copy a single emoji, or grab a whole bestie combo set in one click.
